recommendations:
Hester McQueen, Chartered Marketer

I consider myself fortunate to have had Melanie as my mentor. Our meetings were always enlightening, and I gained invaluable insights that have empowered me to adapt swiftly in unconventional situations. Thanks to Melanie's guidance, I developed my resilience and the ability to thrive even when facing challenging circumstances. Her recommended readings and frameworks not only provided me with a fresh perspective but also encouraged open discussions, allowing me to see situations from various angles and rethink my approach. This accelerated my professional growth considerably.

Holly Kane MCIM

Melanie is an excellent mentor, she took time to understand what I was finding challenging. She then gave me practical solutions as well as guidance on softer skills. I still use her advice today. It has made a huge positive difference to me and I’m very fortunate to benefit from her extensive career experience. Melanie is very approachable while remaining professional at all times and has a really positive energy which is really motivating.

Samantha Clark

Mel is an exceptional human both professionally and personally. Mel brings the perfect balance of commercialism, deep technical expertise, collaboration and leadership and would be an asset to any organisation.
